text.title: QA Test Data Catalog Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the qa-test-data-catalog methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: classify-pii
step.action: Flag contains_pii per fixture; require anonymisation where true.

step.name: set-refresh
step.action: Decide refresh scope per fixture from scope decorator and usage.

step.name: enforce-lint
step.action: Add lint rule blocking direct ORM .create() on cataloged models.
